activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis Essay
activities_projects.objective: Develop the ability to critically analyze the story
steps: Analyze the protagonist’s journey and struggles in depth
Discuss the author’s writing style and how achievements are portrayed
Write a 150–200 word essay evaluating the narrative and its impact
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances critical thinking, literary interpretation, and analytical writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis, clarity, and textual evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Character Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare the protagonist with a real-life personality or another literary figure
steps: Identify a real-life achiever or another literary character with similar qualities
Compare their experiences, struggles, and qualities with the protagonist
Present the comparison in a structured essay or table
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops comparative thinking and character analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, depth, and supporting examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Perspective Writing
activities_projects.objective: Explore alternative perspectives in the story
steps: Rewrite a key event from the perspective of a teacher, parent, or friend
Include their thoughts, emotions, and reactions
Write at least 10–12 sentences reflecting this perspective
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages empathy, creative writing, and critical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Consistency with character traits and depth of insight (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Theme and Symbolism Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Identify and interpret themes and symbols in the chapter
steps: Identify key themes such as perseverance, intelligence, or moral values
Find symbolic elements in events or achievements
Explain the significance of each theme and symbol in 2–3 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances literary interpretation and thematic understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis, clarity, and textual support (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Advanced Vocabulary and Contextual Usage
activities_projects.objective: Learn and apply complex vocabulary from the chapter
steps: Identify 10 challenging words from the chapter
Write their meanings, synonyms, antonyms, and usage in context
Construct original sentences demonstrating nuanced understanding
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves advanced vocabulary, language precision, and contextual usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings, sentence construction, and creativity (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Literary Device Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Analyze literary devices used by the author
steps: Identify metaphors, similes, imagery, and dialogue in the chapter
Explain their effect on character development and story mood
Present examples in a table with 2–3 sentences each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of literary techniques and their impact
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, clarity, and depth of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Predictive Writing
activities_projects.objective: Predict future outcomes or impact of the protagonist’s achievements
steps: Imagine how the protagonist’s achievements could influence future generations
Write a 10–12 sentence narrative predicting outcomes
Justify your predictions using events from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances imagination, inference, and reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, plausibility, and textual justification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Interpersonal Analysis Debate
activities_projects.objective: Critically evaluate the protagonist’s choices and ethics
steps: Form groups and debate ethical or moral choices made by the protagonist
Use examples from the text to support arguments
Write a reflective paragraph summarizing your personal stance after the debate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances discussion, critical thinking, and analytical skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments, reasoning, and reflection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Scene Illustration
activities_projects.objective: Visually express understanding of key scenes or achievements
steps: Select a scene depicting a major achievement or struggle
Draw it creatively highlighting symbolic or emotional elements
Write a 3–4 sentence explanation of the scene and its significance
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, clarity, and depth of interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Intertextual Connection Writing
activities_projects.objective: Connect the chapter to real-life experiences or other literature
steps: Identify a real-life scenario or another story highlighting similar themes
Write a 120–150 word piece connecting it to the protagonist’s experiences
Highlight similarities, differences, and lessons learned
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops analytical thinking, connections, and writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of insight, clarity, and relevance (10 marks)
